author: shimanek
releaseNotes: 1.1.12: Fix the 'Load scenes' button not doing anything (device id was compared as number vs string, so sceneLoad was never called). 1.1.11: Effects page shows a 'Load scenes' button for Govee-style bulbs with no effects loaded (calls the driver's sceneLoad), and no longer offers the Tuya preset list to non-Tuya drivers. 1.1.10: Support large effect ids (e.g. Govee cloud/DIY scene codes) when applying light patterns. 1.1.9: Fix light patterns applying the wrong/previous selection - effect and color pickers now save immediately (submitOnChange); per-bulb apply prefers the advertised effect over a stale preset. 1.1.8: 'Turn bulbs off when the show stops' toggle. 1.1.7: disabling the show turns bulbs off. 1.1.6: Tuya rgb8 colour encoding. 1.1.5: show toggle on Done. 1.1.4: submitOnChange on show settings. 1.1.3: schedule() cron. 1.1.2: atomicState. 1.1.1: per-bulb try/catch + logging. 1.1.0: optional patched Tuya driver. 1.0.0: initial release.
